title: Contributor auto-routing is incomplete - routing calculated but not applied
description: init_contributor sets contributor.planning_repo and contributor.auto_route, and create.go calls DetermineTargetRepo which correctly calculates the target repo, but then there's a TODO comment (bd-4ms) saying multi-repo support isn't implemented yet. The repoPath is just logged in debug mode but never actually used to switch databases. All issues are created in the current repo (.) regardless of routing configuration.

comments.author: tim.visher
comments.text: Implementation Progress: Added imports, replaced TODO with routing logic, opens target DB, replaced all store calls with targetStore (7 places), sets source_repo correctly. Code compiles and routes to correct path. Planning repo needs database initialization. Files modified: cmd/bd/create.go (backed up to create.go.backup)

title: bd close fails with 'FOREIGN KEY constraint failed' after bd comment on new issue

comments.author: tim.visher
comments.text:
**Steps to Reproduce**:
1. Create new issue: `bd new --priority P1 --type task "title"` → creates main-e09
2. Add comment: `bd comment main-e09 "some text"` → succeeds
3. Try to close: `bd close main-e09` → fails with "constraint failed: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed"

**Observed Behavior**:
- `bd show main-e09` returns "issue not found"
- `bd list` shows the issue exists and is open
- Cannot close the issue

**Version**: bd version 0.23.1 (dev) built from commit 4223307

title: Build and install beads from HEAD (4223307) to replace Homebrew version (77dcf55)

comments.author: tim.visher
comments.text:
**Current State**:
- Installed version: 0.23.1 (77dcf55) via Homebrew at /opt/homebrew/bin/bd
- HEAD version: 4223307 in /Users/tim.visher/git/steveyegge/beads/main
- Need to build from source and install to replace Homebrew version

**Build Steps**:
1. cd /Users/tim.visher/git/steveyegge/beads/main
2. make build (creates ./bd binary)
3. make install (installs to $(go env GOPATH)/bin)
4. Ensure GOPATH/bin is in PATH before /opt/homebrew/bin

**Verification**:
- Run `which bd` to confirm location
- Run `bd --version` to verify it shows 4223307

comments.author: tim.visher
comments.text:
✓ Successfully built and installed beads from HEAD:
- Built with: make install
- Installed to: /Users/tim.visher/go/bin/bd
- New version: bd version 0.23.1 (dev)
- Previous version: bd version 0.23.1 (77dcf55)
- GOPATH/bin is already before /opt/homebrew/bin in PATH

title: bd repo add fails with 'unexpected end of JSON input' when repos.additional config doesn't exist

comments.author: tim.visher
comments.text:
**Root Cause**:
In repo.go line 201, GetConfig returns empty string instead of 'not found' error when repos.additional doesn't exist. This causes json.Unmarshal to fail with 'unexpected end of JSON input'.

**Workaround**:
Run `bd config set repos.additional '{}'` before first `bd repo add`.

**Fix Required**:
repo.go should check if config key exists and initialize empty object if not, or json.Unmarshal should handle empty string gracefully.

**Related Issues**:
- create.go line ~153 has TODO 'Switch to target repo for multi-repo support (bd-4ms)' - the --repo flag doesn't actually switch repos, just logs in debug mode
